MINI MINUTES:
The following matters were heard; PCN-303270 Conservatorship of Virginia Claudio and PTR-20-303703 In the Matter of Francisco J. Claudio and Virginia P. Claudio
Appearances; Amy Harrington appearing via zoom for Angelo Claudio and Donna Claudio (trustees).

Mrs. Harrington requested a one-month continuance to file the two accounting petitions. THe two accountings are continued to June 26, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge; Ross Moody; Clerk: Ateesh Datt; Deputy: Choi; Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Mar-10-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amy Harrington, via ZOOM, for Angelo Claudio and Donna Claudio, Co-Trustees.

The court advises that the accounting petitions seems fine except for the request to reduce bond amount. Ms. Harrington provides oral advocacy for her request stating that she had received conflicting information regarding the amount of bond and that an ex parte application to increase the bond was filed on Oct-22-2021. The court queries Ms. Harrington regarding the real properties especially the Brunswick Street property. Ms. Harrington reports that it is not likely that Ms. Claudio will be returning to the Brunswick Street property and is likely to be rented.

The Accounting Petition is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Ronald Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: G. Bastain. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amy Harrington, via ZOOM, counsel for Angelo Claudio and Donna Claudio, Petitioners.

Counsel reports at the outset that she has filed an accounting with a hearing date on July 19, 2021.

The Future Accounting is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
